svg.text: i = 0: nums[0] = 3, target index 2. Swap with nums[2] = 5 → [5, 1, 3, 4, 2]
i = 0: nums[0] = 5, target index 4. Swap with nums[4] = 2 → [2, 1, 3, 4, 5]
i = 0: nums[0] = 2, target index 1. Swap with nums[1] = 1 → [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
i = 0: nums[0] = 1, in place. Advance i.
i = 1..4: every value already at its target index. No more swaps.
Total swaps: 3. Each swap fixes one position; outer loop never revisits done indices.
Input: [4, 0, 3, 1] — values in 0..n, n = 4. One value is missing.
Place each v at index v. After cyclic sort: [0, 1, ?, 3, 4] where ? marks gap.
Skip swap when target index would be out of range (v == n).
After pass, scan for first index where nums[i] != i — that index is the missing value.
For duplicates: after pass, any nums[i] != i+1 reveals both the duplicate and missing.
One pass places values; second pass identifies anomalies.
